ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex (0 = Male, 1 = Female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "name_length" INTEGER /* Length of the passenger's name */,
  "fare_log" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of the fare */,
  "fare_bin" INTEGER /* Fare bin (0 = Low, 1 = High) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (e.g., C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number or deck information */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title extracted from the name (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Miss., Master.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_fare_bin FOREIGN KEY ("fare_bin") REFERENCES fare_bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_survived FOREIGN KEY ("survived") REFERENCES survival_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival status (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare bin */,
  "bin_name" TEXT /* Name of the fare bin (e.g., Low, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data transformation */,
  "transformation_name" TEXT /* Name of the data transformation (e.g., Logarithmic, Binning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data transformation */,
  "transformation_date" TEXT /* Date when the transformation was applied */,
  "applied_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who applied the transformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_applied_by FOREIGN KEY ("applied_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the passenger data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the passenger data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger for whom the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_survival" INTEGER /* Predicted survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
